name: Crab Soup with Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the shallots in the butter over direct heat until very soft but not browned. Stir in the flour. Add the warm milk slowly, stirring as added. Place over simmering water and add Worcestershire sauce, pepper, and crab meat. Let cook, stirring frequently, for 15-20 minutes (up to about 1 hour before serving). Cover and keep covered over hot water, stirring occasionally.
2. Add a small amount of the hot soup to the beaten egg yolks and stir mixture back into soup. Season with salt as needed. Add the sherry and heat until steaming hot.
3. Serve soup in warm bowls. Top each serving with whipped cream, sprinkle with paprika, and serve immediately.
